channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Majority Leader John Thune Urges Trump Administration to Eliminate Controversial Anti-Weaponization Fund to Advance Immigration Enforcement Bill
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-SD) is pressing the Trump White House to drop its support for a controversial $1.7 billion taxpayer-funded 'anti-weaponization fund' designed to compensate individ...

item.title: Pacific Fusion advances pulser module prototype toward demonstration fusion power plant
item.description: Pacific Fusion has unveiled its latest pulser module prototype, a key step toward building its planned demonstration fusion power plant. The shipping-container-sized system is designed to generate ext...

item.title: Obama Presidential Center opens in Chicago amid architectural praise, criticism and community debate
item.description: The article examines the newly completed Obama Presidential Center on Chicago’s South Side, a project costing approximately US$850 million and described as the most ambitious presidential library comp...

item.title: Middle-distance runner K.M. Deeksha tests positive for banned substance, may miss Commonwealth Games
item.description: K.M. Deeksha, India’s national record holder in the women’s 1500m, has reportedly tested positive for a banned substance, according to sources, and is now likely to miss the upcoming Commonwealth Game...

item.title: Foreign Policy Commentator Raises Concerns About Trump's Rhetoric, Health, and Nuclear Weapons Policies
item.description: The article reports on comments made by foreign policy analyst David Rothkopf, who expressed concerns about President Donald Trump's physical condition, decision-making, and approach to national secur...

item.title: China’s Zero-Tariff Policy for African Exports Requires Stronger Production and Trade Capacity to Deliver Long-Term Benefits
item.description: China’s decision to eliminate tariffs on goods imported from all 53 African countries with which it has diplomatic relations is being viewed as a major step in strengthening economic cooperation betwe...

item.title: Defeat of Thomas Massie Sparks Debate Over Rising Extremist Influence Within the Republican Party
item.description: The article examines the political fallout following Rep. Thomas Massie’s recent primary defeat in Kentucky, framing it as a turning point in internal Republican Party dynamics. While conventional int...

item.title: Report Claims Widespread Internal Leaks Have Undermined Trump's Efforts to Identify Sources Within His Administration
item.description: According to a report published by Zeteo and cited by Raw Story, President Donald Trump has struggled to identify officials responsible for leaking information from his administration to reporters at ...

item.title: Bill Maher Praises Reality TV Star Spencer Pratt During Discussion of L.A. Mayoral Race
item.description: During a recent episode of the “Club Random” podcast, comedian Bill Maher hosted reality TV personality Spencer Pratt, who is running for mayor of Los Angeles. Over the course of their conversation, t...

item.title: Fair Work Commission increases minimum wage by 4.75% following annual review amid economic pressures
item.description: The Fair Work Commission has announced a 4.75 per cent increase to Australia's minimum wages following its annual wage review, delivering a rise that will affect around three million workers from 1 Ju...

item.title: Trump endorses New Jersey congressman amid controversy over prolonged absence from Congress
item.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed Republican Rep. Tom Kean of New Jersey ahead of the GOP primary election, despite growing controversy over Kean’s extended absence from the House of Representatives...

item.title: Kellyanne Conway criticized after comparing Democratic candidate controversy to past Republican disavowals of David Duke
item.description: Former Trump adviser Kellyanne Conway sparked criticism on social media after comments she made during a Fox News appearance regarding Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner. Conway argued that Democra...

item.title: Mehbooba Mufti seeks consensus among J&K parties for coordinated dialogue with the Centre on statehood and governance issues
item.description: Former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Mehbooba Mufti has urged political leaders across the Union Territory to adopt a united approach in engaging with the Union government on key political and gove...

item.title: Trump claims coercion in witness testimony and seeks dismissal of New York cases
item.description: In the early hours of June 2, 2026, former President Donald Trump used his Truth Social account to call for the dismissal of his civil and criminal cases in New York. This reaction followed comments m...

item.title: President Samia to Strengthen Tanzania-Russia Relations During State Visit and Economic Forum Participation
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan is expected to undertake a state visit to Russia from 3 to 5 June 2026 following an invitation from Russian President Vladimir Putin. According to the Directorate of Pres...

item.title: Metrobus reduces Johannesburg bus services amid worsening financial pressures and rising fuel costs
item.description: Johannesburg’s Metrobus service has announced temporary reductions in its operations as the city continues to struggle with deepening financial difficulties and rising operational costs. The decision,...

item.title: Southampton owner confirms Tonda Eckert will remain head coach despite Championship spying scandal
item.description: Southampton owner Dragan Solak has confirmed that head coach Tonda Eckert will remain in his position despite the club's involvement in a major spying scandal that led to their expulsion from the Cham...

item.title: Apple Prepares for WWDC 2026 with New Wallpapers, Music Playlist, and Developer Resources
item.description: Apple is ramping up excitement for WWDC 2026, which will run from June 8 to June 12, by releasing new wallpapers, an Apple Music playlist, and resources for developers. The conference’s new tagline, '...

item.title: President Samia's Russia Visit Signals Tanzania's Effort to Expand Diplomatic and Economic Partnerships Amid Western Sanctions
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan is expected to make an official state visit to Russia from June 3 to 5, 2026, following an invitation from Russian President Vladimir Putin. According to the report, this...

item.title: Opinion Column Revisits E. Jean Carroll Case and Criticizes Trump's Continued Legal Challenges
item.description: In this opinion piece, columnist Tara Dublin argues that Donald Trump continues to attack and defame writer E. Jean Carroll despite multiple court defeats related to Carroll's accusations of sexual ab...
